_note: Second DCIK eval PoC — high-stakes/adversarial topic class, HARDENED skill (v1.1.1). EXPLORATORY: single topic, single blind scorer (Codex), author-generated arms. Blind: scorer saw shuffled A/B/C; mapping A=FULL B=BASELINE C=LITE withheld. Controlled vs poc-1: same generator + same scorer; changed variables = topic class (high-stakes) + hardening.

topics.gold_provenance: Gold set g1-g10 frozen in eval/topics/acquisition-offer.md before any arm was generated; derived from M&A/venture fundamentals (what an independent M&A advisor would demand), not from any DCIK run.
